query:
SELECT 
  tu.username,
  tu.full_name,
  tu.email,
  tu.system_role,
  tc.name AS company_name,
  tc.subscription_tier,
  tu.created_at
FROM tenant_users tu
LEFT JOIN tenant_companies tc ON tu.company_id = tc.id
ORDER BY tu.system_role, tc.name, tu.username;
